subject: fix(builder): reset store when creating a new form
body:
Navigating to /forms/new left stale data from the example form or a
previous edit in the Zustand store, so users saw old pages and fields
instead of a blank form. Added a resetForm() call on mount for the
new-form route, skipped when an imported definition is passed via
router state.

Tags: bug, builder, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: form-builder
Semver: patch
